entities.name: CGIAR
entities.description: The Consultative Group on International Agricultural Research and its partners engaged in global scientific research and development to combat drought and desertification

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: A condition of prolonged water shortage that the CGIAR aims to combat

entities.name: DESERTIFICATION
entities.description: The process of land degradation in arid, semi-arid and dry sub-humid areas, which the CGIAR aims to combat

entities.name: NATURAL RESOURCES
entities.description: Environmental assets that the CGIAR provides innovations for better utilization

entities.name: SUB-SAHARAN AFRICA
entities.description: A primary region where the research-for-development outputs of CGIAR have been applied

entities.name: SOUTH ASIA
entities.description: A primary region where the research-for-development outputs of CGIAR have been applied

entities.name: BREEDING
entities.description: The process of developing crop cultivars with specific desired traits

entities.name: CROP CULTIVARS
entities.description: Agricultural plant varieties developed through breeding for specific traits

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a crop to maintain productivity during water-deficit conditions

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE SOIL AND WATER MANAGEMENT
entities.description: An output of research-for-development aimed at combating desertification and drought

entities.name: NATURAL RESOURCE CONSERVING TECHNOLOGIES
entities.description: Technologies developed to conserve natural resources and combat desertification
